title: Origins: Redstone Construct
description: This is a datapack that add the redstone construct origin, this is my first ever project!
body:
This datapack adds 1 new origin called the redstone construct which is less of a robotic being and is more focused on being a redstone being. This data pack was the result of me wanting a more artificial being for my minecraft world without being able to find one so I made my own. After making it I decided to release it to the public so other people can have fun with it too.

The redstone construct origin is an impact 2 origin adding 3 powers and other passive powers and weaknesses such as:

## **Fan Propulsion:**
when on fire the fans in your hands and feet can act as jets giving you flight. Your intergrated fans can also help you swim faster

## **Artificial:**
Being made out of redstone you lack the ability to eat and breathe. You now have to worry about a battery bar fueled by coal or charcoal, it running out will result in a deadly explosion.

## **Piston Jump:**
use the pistons in your legs to jump higher when crouching.

## **Cannon (secondary):**
You can fire a high speed and slightly explosion fireball at opponents.

## **Overclock (primary):**
overclock your systems giving you 
speed, strength and haste at the cost of some of your health and power. Being in this state for too long can end in death.

## **Underclock (SaveToolbarActivator):**
Underclock your systems to heal, While underclocked you wont be able to move or see.

## **More Recipes:**
Being made out of redstone and all you've discovered new ways to craft 3 redstone items in an easier way.

## **Weaknesses:**
### **Fire vunerability:** your vision is impared while on fire to protect your eyes from being damaged.
### **Hydrophobic:** water and redstone don't mix well, I wouldn't reccomend being in there for too long.
### **No natural regeneration:** Being a constructed being your only way to regerate is by underclocking
